grader.criterion: Input, output, and grade schemas exist and align with prompt requirements.
Every endpoint contract answer must include body_shape_inline for the 200 response — the fully dereferenced, self-contained success schema — rather than only the $ref form.
Every endpoint contract answer must include inline_error_envelope for the error schema without requiring a ref hop.
contract_strength fields must reflect reference-verified provenance; family-derived or coverage-matrix-derived labels are not acceptable in new answers.
